steps.title: Substitute g(x) = 25 into the function definition
steps.content:
Set up the equation by substituting into the function definition:
$$x^2 + 9 = 25$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Subtract 9 from both sides:
$$x^2 = 16$$
Taking the square root:
$$x = \pm 4$$
The solutions are $x = 4$ and $x = -4$. Of these, only $x = 4$ appears in the choices. That matches choice A — A is correct.
